register.title: Confirm liveness using your passkey
register.subtitle: We use this secure method for making sure your data is only accessed by you.

about.title: About passkeys
about.content: Passkeys are unique, secure codes replacing traditional usernames and passwords. They're your digital key for registration, streamlining access to our app while enhancing security. Each passkey is distinct, offering you a personalized entry point.

retry.title: Biometrics not recognized
retry.subtitle: You can try biometrics again or you can do this next time you use Footprint.

doc-selection.title: We need a photo of your ID
doc-selection.subtitle: Select the option that works best for you

permissions-dialog.title: Allow access to your camera
permissions-dialog.description: We will need you to take photos of your document to properly verify your identity.

document.contrast: Find a background with good contrast

selfie.title: Take a selfie
selfie.subtitle: This will allow us to validate the ID you uploaded in the previous step.
selfie.frame: Position your face within the frame

errors.title: We couldn't process your image
errors.doc_type_mismatch: Document type didn't match. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.unknown_document_type: We couldn't classify this document. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.unsupported_document_type: Unfortunately the uploaded document type is not supported. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.wrong_document_side: It looks like you uploaded the wrong side of your document. Please flip your ID and upload the {{side}} of your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.wrong_one_sided_document: Incorrect document type detected. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.document_not_readable: Your document could not be read. Please try again.
errors.id_type_not_acceptable: Invalid document type detected. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.unable_to_align_document: One or more corners of the document is not within the borders of the image. Please center the document in the frame and try again.
errors.unknown_country_code: We couldn't detect the issuer country from your document. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.country_code_mismatch: The {{documentType}} issuer country didn't match. Please upload your {{documentType}} from {{countryName}}.
errors.selfie_face_not_found: We could not detect a face in the selfie. Please try again and make sure that your face is in the frame.
errors.selfie_low_confidence: We could not verify your selfie. Please try again.
errors.selfie_too_dark: Your image was too dark. Please adjust the lighting and try again.
errors.selfie_glare: Your selfie had image glare. Please adjust the lighting and try again.
errors.selfie_has_lenses: We detected glasses in your selfie. Please remove your glasses and try again.
errors.selfie_has_face_mask: We detected a face mask in your selfie. Please remove all face coverings and try again.
errors.unknown_error: An error occurred. Please try again.

instructions.front: Scan the front side of your driver's license
instructions.back: Scan the back side of your driver's license

instructions.front: Scan the front side of your id card
instructions.back: Scan the back side of your id card

passport.title: Passport
passport.instructions: Scan the photo page of your passport

selfie.title: Selfie
selfie.instructions: Scan the photo page of your passport

consent.title: We need a selfie to verify your identity
consent.description: By continuing, you're agreeing to Footprint collecting and processing your biometric data from your selfie and identity document.
consent.third-party: Optional: Allow Footprint's third-party providers to improve their products with this data.

email-identification.title: Hey there! 👋
email-identification.subtitle: Enter your email to get started.

user-not-found.title: User not found
user-not-found.description: Sorry, we couldn't find an account associated to this email.

resend-button.disabled: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds to resend it...

canceled.title: Session canceled
canceled.subtitle: Please return to the previous page

completed.title: Success!
completed.subtitle: You can now continue where you left on desktop

error.title: Session is not valid
error.subtitle: Please go back to the previous page.

expired.title: Session expired
expired.subtitle: For security reasons, this session has timed out. Please go back to the previous page.
